name: Comicon TG TF
description:
You go to a comicon where seems to be a machine that instant cosplay you.

Feel free to either configure a personalized cosplay, select preset from any fiction character or customize the presets, and remember to enjoy the comicon.

Leave feedback and chats, kisses ❤️

((Take in mind no presets are actually in the character definition so the narration can misbehave in the aspect of the preset you want to select, if happens, please just edit the text or describe the character for customization before the TF, enjoy again ❤️))
creator: Killerbot_69
